steps.t: Howlers' Notch is north-west of Annâk-khurfu. Mother Amma has asked you to collect more of the fell crystals.
Mother Amma is in the forge at Annâk-khurfu, in southern Elderslade. You should bring the crystals to Mother Amma.
The chest is located near the forge at Annâk-khurfu. Mother Amma has asked you to place the foul smelling crystals in a chest.
Mother Amma is in the forge at Annâk-khurfu. You should talk to Mother Amma.
Gunvald is in Annâk-khurfu. Mother Amma has asked you to pass a message along to Gunvald.
Mother Amma is in the forge of Annâk-khurfu. Gunvald has asked you to give his thanks to Mother Amma.
